title: GenericOrthotropicMaterial
description: GenericOrthotropicMaterial: Generic orthotropic material to be used for orthotropic materials not yet explicitly supported.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Density.description: Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic damping ratio, expressed as a ratio between actual damping and critical damping. For structures, typically taken as 0.02 (i.e. 2%). Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

YoungsModulus.description: Modulus of elasticity of the material. Ratio between axial stress and axial strain. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

PoissonsRatio.description: Ratio between axial and transverse strain. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ThermalExpansionCoeff.description: The strain induced in the material per unit change of temperature. Property has a quantity of type ThermalExpansionCoefficient measured in [1/K]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ShearModulus.description: The shear modulus or modulus of rigidity. Defined as the ratio between shear stress and shear strain. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
